description:
Fast, modern desktop translation application

A fast, modern desktop translation application built with Rust and Tauri that provides instant translation between multiple languages with global hotkey support, system tray integration, and a beautiful user interface. Supports OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Ollama for both cloud and local AI-powered translations.
🚀 New Features:
• Ollama Support: Added complete support for Ollama local AI models for offline translation
• Provider Architecture: Refactored translation system with modular provider design
• Local Translation: Run translations completely offline with privacy-focused local models

🎯 Improvements:
• Provider UI: Beautiful new provider selection grid with professional icons
• Settings Redesign: Replaced dropdown with intuitive card-based provider selection
• Better Organization: Split translation code into separate provider modules
• Enhanced Config: Added ollama_url configuration with automatic defaults

🔧 Technical:
• Added ollama-rs crate integration for robust Ollama communication
• Improved error handling across all translation providers
• Enhanced validation system for all API endpoints including Ollama server connectivity
